home.heroText: We are a couple touring glampings across Czechia and beyond. We write honestly about what delighted us — and what isn't quite thought through.
home.howStep1Text: Every review opens with a personal story — how sleeping, breakfasting and unwinding at your place really feels.
home.howStep2Text: An honest list of what we love and the details that could be improved.
home.howStep3Text: One overall score from 1–10 and a one-sentence summary.
home.ownersText: Invite us for a stay. We'll write an honest review and give you concrete tips on what to improve.

reviews.title: Glamping reviews
reviews.empty: Nothing here yet — the first reviews are on their way.

review.ctaTitle: Do you run a glamping? Invite us.
